About

Highly innovative and results-driven Creative AI & XR Specialist with a passion for crafting cutting-edge immersive experiences leveraging XR Development principles and advanced 3D Animation techniques. Proven expertise in utilizing both Unreal Engine and Unity to develop engaging interactive applications, WebXR projects, and compelling cinematic content. Adept at integrating Generative AI workflows to streamline creative processes and push the boundaries of visual storytelling. My experience spans projects for major labels like Republic, Atlantic, and Warner Records, achieving millions of views on platforms such as YouTube, showcasing a blend of technical proficiency and artistic vision.

Proficient in a wide array of industry-leading tools including Unreal Engine, Unity, Cinema 4D, Blender, and Autodesk Maya, alongside advanced Generative AI tools like Reallusion iClone, Character Creator, and Midjourney. I excel at XR Development across AR, VR, and MR platforms, applying strong 3D Animation skills to bring compelling narratives and interactive experiences to life. Seeking to contribute expertise in XR Development, 3D Animation, and Generative AI to innovative projects within the tech, entertainment, and education sectors.

sections.experience:
Experience

Realtime Content Designer

Crossroads Church (Cincinnati, OH) · Full-time

Aug 2025 - Present · 10 mos

Cincinnati, Ohio, United States · On-site

As a Realtime Content Designer at Crossroads Church, I create immersive, visually engaging content for worship experiences, events, and digital platforms, leveraging real-time rendering tools like Unreal Engine and Disguise to bring dynamic visuals to life. I collaborate with video producers, pastors, musicians, and the broader creative team to design visuals that enhance storytelling and support spiritual moments across both physical and virtual environments.

My role includes:

Designing and animating real-time visuals for live events, services, and stage environments

Creating reactive content that responds to audio, motion, and lighting cues in real time

Integrating XR, projection mapping, and motion graphics into live and streamed worship experiences

Collaborating on visual storytelling for sermon series, music sets, and seasonal campaigns

Innovating new visual approaches using generative AI, XR, and procedural tools

Supporting content pipelines with asset optimization, shader creation, and look development

I'm passionate about blending faith, art, and technology to help people connect more deeply with the message, and to make every gathering feel cinematic, immersive, and memorable.
